response.snippet: Cowboy Carter landed Beyoncé her biggest streaming week ever and broke streaming records on several platforms. Got That Dope Derek Dixie Dixson Ian Fitchuk Harry Edwards Shawn Everett Nathan Ferraro Ink Tyler Johnson Paul McCartney No I.D. Nova Wav Dave Hamelin Killah B Nick Kobe Mamii Simon Mårtensson Pharrell Williams Jack Ro Raphael Saadiq Sean Solymar Sounwave Swizz Beatz The-Dream Khirye Tyler Beyoncé chronology Renaissance (2022) Cowboy Carter (2024) Singles from Cowboy Carter " Texas Hold 'Em " Released: February 11, 2024 " 16 Carriages " Released: February 11, 2024 " II Most Wanted " Released: April 15, 2024 Cowboy Carter (also referred to as Act II: Cowboy Carter ) is the eighth studio album by American singer and songwriter Beyoncé . It was released on March 29, 2024, by Parkwood Entertainment and Columbia Records . A concept album , Cowboy Carter is the second of a planned trilogy of albums, following Renaissance (2022). Beyoncé conceived the album as a journey through a reinvention of Americana , spotlighting the overlooked contributions of Black pioneers to American musical and cultural history . A genre-blending album rooted in country music , Cowboy Carter is influenced by Beyoncé's upbringing in Texas , incorporating eclectic styles of music of the Southern United States . Conceptually, the album is presented as a radio broadcast, with country singe

response.snippet: Beyoncé's entry album into the country music genre, Cowboy Carter, was released on March 29, and it's already shattering records on streaming platforms.
response.content: Beyoncé's 'Cowboy Carter' Breaks Streaming Records On Spotify & Amazon Music Continue to Deadline SKIP AD You will be redirected back to your article in seconds Skip to main content By Armando Tinoco Armando Tinoco Staff Writer @armietinoco More Stories By Armando ‘Supergirl’ First Reactions: “Mixed” Reviews, Praise Milly Alcock & Jason Momoa’s Roles & Highlight David Corenswet’s Superman As “Peak Casting” Rosie O’Donnell Is Open To Return To ‘The View’ As A Guest Host, “But They Haven’t Asked Me” Kyle Cooke Clarifies ‘Summer House’ “Isn’t Cancelled” & “This Is Not Me Announcing I Won’t Return” Following Emotional Message View All March 31, 2024 4:04pm 14 Comments Services to share this page. Share on Facebook Post Google Preferred Share to Flipboard Show more sharing options Email Share on LinkedIn Pin it Submit to Reddit Post to Tumblr Share on WhatsApp Print This Page Beyoncé Instagram @beyonce Beyoncé ‘s entry album into the country music genre, Cowboy Carter , was released on March 29, and it’s already shattering records on streaming platforms. After the “Texas Hold ‘Em” singer dropped her new album, Spotify said it became the platform’s “most-streamed album in a single day in 2024 so far.” “This is also the first time a country album holds the title this year,” Spotify shared on Instagram . Amazon Music also said in a statement posted on Instagram , “ Cowboy Carter marks Beyoncé’s biggest album debut” on the platform “with the most first-day global streams of all of her albums, and the most first-day streams for a country album by a female artist.” Related Stories News Tony Bellew & Charlie Parsons Team For Boxing Show & Podcast 'Fight Your Corner' News Spotify Stock Falls On Q2 Guidance For Paid Subscribers Cowboy Carter is Beyoncé’s eighth studio album. It features collaborations with Miley Cyrus, Post Malone, Rhiannon Giddens, Stevie Wonder, Nile Rodgers, Raye, Ryan Beatty, and Jon Batiste. The album also pays homage to Dolly Parton with a cover of “Jolene,
